_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: the expression of Pten protein was significantly higher in SVZ-derived cells than those derived from autologous parenchymal tumors with Pten/chr19 loss
details: Successfully detected differential Pten protein expression between SVZ-derived cells and parenchymal tumors, with significantly higher expression in SVZ-derived cells
